summary: The generated page reproduces the main content structure and copy of the About VANDDMYO page fairly well — hero, intro split, three how-it-works cards, eligibility flip cards, ask-about CTA, dual CTA panels, ISI, and footer are all present in the correct order with mostly accurate text. However several notable gaps exist: the BCMA accordion body content is entirely empty (missing two list items), the eligibility flip-card BACK content (all four cards' details) is missing, the ISI tray full detail/offcanvas content is reduced to a truncated placeholder, header nav lacks the Prescribing/Important Facts/HCP link destinations and mobile menu, and there is an 'FPO' placeholder in the ISI. Page title and meta/SEO tags are also simplified.

differences.live:
• The special "grabbers" on [VANDDMYO] are designed to be small and stable...
  • The trained cells are engineered for a “quick release.”...
differences.recommendation: Populate the accordion body with the two bullet points describing the small/stable grabbers and quick-release engineering.

differences.live: Each flip card has back content, e.g. 'Living with multiple myeloma and having had at least 3 kinds of treatment not work...', 'Tried 3 or more different types of treatments... Immunomodulators / Proteasome inhibitors / Anti-CD38 antibodies', 'Have multiple myeloma that is standard or high risk', 'Age 18 years or older', plus a 'Reset' CTA.
differences.generated: Flip cards only render the front (title + 'Find out more'); no back-face content, list items, or Reset CTA.
differences.recommendation: Add the card-back content and Reset controls for all four eligibility flip cards to preserve the interactive detail.

differences.live: Full ISI offcanvas with tabs (Approved Uses / Safety Information), detailed 'How will I receive', 'What should I avoid', side effects lists, CRS paragraph, FDA MedWatch link, and Important Facts link.
differences.generated: Only a short two-column summary and a 'Read' button; no offcanvas detail content or tabs.
differences.recommendation: Include the full ISI offcanvas markup with detailed safety information, tabs, and footer navigation as on the live page.
Remove the 'FPO' placeholder from the ISI floating tray.

differences.live: Prescribing Information -> https://www.gilead.com/, Important Facts -> /edsredesign, Visit HCP Site -> https://www.gilead.com/ (with external icon and target=_blank).
differences.generated: All three links point to '#' with a generic icon-button.svg.
differences.recommendation: Restore the correct destinations, external-link behavior, and icons for the secondary nav links.
Set the correct href targets for each main navigation item.

differences.live: Sign up -> /sign-up; Doctor discussion guide -> /support-and-resources#downloadable-resources-section; Stay informed -> /sign-up; See the lasting results -> /results-and-side-effects.
differences.recommendation: Point CTAs at their live destinations.

differences.live: <title>What is VANDDMYO®? | A CAR T-Cell Therapy for Myeloma</title> plus canonical, og:, twitter:, and meta description tags.
differences.recommendation: Add the proper page title and SEO/social meta tags matching the live page.

differences.live: Single SVG logo image (logos.svg) with alt 'VANDDMYO (vandecabtagene autoleucel) logo'.
differences.generated: Logo reconstructed from ~30 absolutely positioned vector SVG fragments.
differences.recommendation: Replace the fragmented SVG assembly with the single logos.svg image for maintainability and correct alt text.

differences.area: Header mobile menu / hamburger nav items
differences.live: Mobile hamburger menu includes duplicate Prescribing Information, Important Facts, and Visit HCP Site links.
differences.generated: Mobile toggle exists but the mobile-only external link list is absent.
differences.recommendation: Add the mobile-hm-links list for parity on small screens.
Reorder footer social icons to Instagram, Facebook, YouTube to match live.

differences.live: 'Your newly trained T cells have special "grabbers"...' with 'newly trained T cells' emphasized as part of a larger bold span.
differences.generated: Emphasis boundaries differ slightly (e.g., newly trained T cells separated), otherwise text matches.
differences.recommendation: Minor; align bold emphasis spans with live copy if exact styling matters.
